subject: Code Review: Kernel Lane (stripe-rake branch) — Individual Summary
body: Kernel lane individual code review for branch stripe-rake vs origin/main. 29 commits, extensive changes across audit infrastructure, compact workflow, trust-store handling, schema enhancements, profiling infrastructure, and inbox housekeeping. Overall assessment: APPROVE WITH SUGGESTIONS. No critical issues found. 2 warnings, 8 suggestions for improvement.

warnings.issue: Heartbeat timestamp parsed without validation; malformed timestamps cause NaN age calculations
Validation errors thrown without preserving original stack trace

suggestions.issue: determineStatus comment says trust_store changes non-critical but they still appear in unexpected_changes
Trust store backup/restore uses direct fs.writeFileSync without atomic write; crash between write and restore could corrupt
Watcher re-reads entire inbox on each poll; performance degrades with inbox size
Logs raw JWT/JWS token on verification failure, potentially leaking secrets to logs
executeGate lacks explicit return values on some error paths; callers may interpret undefined as success
Guard checks file existence before write but does not handle TOCTOU race conditions
Deployment instructions assume PowerShell only; no cross-platform guidance
CSV lacks header row; downstream scripts may misinterpret column order
